full_text:
# Agent SRE. *SLOs · Error Budgets · Chaos Testing · Progressive Delivery · Cost Guardrails*. > 🔗 **Part of the Agent Governance Ecosystem** — Works with Agent OS (governance), AgentMesh (identity & trust), and Agent Runtime (runtime sessions). > 📦 **Install the full stack:** `pip install agent-governance-toolkit[full]` — PyPI | GitHub.
